patterns.name: Datadog API Key
patterns.description: Datadog API key used to submit metrics, logs, and traces
patterns.risk: Can submit metrics/logs as your org, potentially exhaust quotas or inject false telemetry.
patterns.fix: Use DD_API_KEY or DATADOG_API_KEY environment variable. Rotate if exposed.
false_positive_hints: Ignore all-zero or repeated hex placeholders in docs

patterns.name: Datadog Application Key
patterns.description: Datadog Application key used with API key for full API access
patterns.risk: Combined with an API key, can read/modify monitors, dashboards, and org configuration.
patterns.fix: Use DD_APP_KEY or DATADOG_APP_KEY environment variable. Rotate if exposed.

patterns.name: Datadog DD_API_KEY assignment
patterns.description: DD_API_KEY environment-style assignment with a 32-char hex value
patterns.risk: Likely a real Datadog API key hardcoded in source or config.
patterns.fix: Inject DD_API_KEY at runtime via secrets manager or CI secrets.
